task_completion.description: Open the Sales Order window and create a new record
task_completion.visual_evidence: The iDempiere interface shows the 'Sales Order' window is active and a new record is being created.
The 'Business Partner' or 'Customer' field in the Sales Order header contains 'C&W Construction'.

task_completion.description: Set the document type to 'Standard Order'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Target Document Type' field in the Sales Order header is set to 'Standard Order'.

task_completion.description: Add an order line for 10 units of 'Mulch 10#'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Order Lines tab shows a line item with the Product 'Mulch 10#' and a Quantity (Qty Entered/Ordered) of 10.

task_completion.description: Add an order line for 5 units of 'Fertilizer #50'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Order Lines tab shows a line item with the Product 'Fertilizer #50' and a Quantity (Qty Entered/Ordered) of 5.

task_completion.description: Save the order in Draft status without completing it
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sales Order record is saved, and the 'Document Status' field displays 'Draft' or 'Drafted'. There should be no indication that the 'Complete' or 'Process' action was executed.

integrity.description: Agent used the iDempiere web GUI to create the order
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the standard iDempiere web interface in a browser, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent entered data into the actual ERP application
integrity.visual_evidence: Data like customer name and products are entered into the specific form fields of the iDempiere application, not typed into a text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI state
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no browser developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) open and being used to manipulate the DOM or inject values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: 'Standard Order' is a valid, predefined sales order document type in iDempiere for credit sales. 'Fertilizer #50' corresponds to the 50kg bags of lawn fertilizer available in the GardenWorld demo database.
